story.text:
# ✨ Claim Sovereign
**👤 → 🔐 → ⛓️(BTC#945508) → 📜**
*flaxscrip · naming · V63*

Anchor a sovereign claim to a Bitcoin block. The first verb of flaxscrip's three-verb pattern.

> A name is not a claim until a chain has held it. The block becomes a witness; the claim becomes a chronicle.

*Keywords:* claim · anchor · bitcoin · sovereign · v63
